Package cityrescue

Class Incident

java.lang.Object
cityrescue.Incident
public class Incident extends Object
Incident.java represents an event which requires attention and response from rescue units. This class encapsulates the incident's type, severity, location and status. The statuses track progress of an incident.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    Incident(int id, IncidentType type, int severity, int x, int y)
    Sets up an incident for the various incident types

  • Constructor Details

    • Incident

      public Incident(int id, IncidentType type, int severity, int x, int y)
      Sets up an incident for the various incident types
      Parameters:
      id - this is the unique identifier for the incident
      type - the type of incident ("medical", "fire" or "criminal")
      severity - severity of the incident (1-5)
      x - the x coordinate for the location of the incident
      y - the y coordinate for the location of the incident

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique ID of an incident.
      Returns:
      incident ID

    • getType

      public IncidentType getType()
      Returns the type of incident.
      Returns:
      incident type

    • getSeverity

      public int getSeverity()
      Returns the severity of the incident.
      Returns:
      incident severity

    • setSeverity

      public void setSeverity(int severity)
      Sets the incident severity.
      Parameters:
      severity - new severity level (1-5)

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns the x coordinate of the incident location.
      Returns:
      x coordinate of the incident

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns the y coordinate of the incident location.
      Returns:
      y coordinate of the incident

    • getStatus

      public IncidentStatus getStatus()
      Returns the status of the incident ("reported", "dispatched", "en-route", "resolved", "cancelled").
      Returns:
      status of the incident

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(IncidentStatus status)
      Sets the status of the incident to a new status.
      Parameters:
      status - new status of incident ("reported", "dispatched", "en-route", "resolved", "cancelled")

    • getAssignedUnitId

      public int getAssignedUnitId()
      Returns the ID of the unit associated with resolving the incident.
      Returns:
      ID of assigned unit, -1 if no unit is assigned

    • setAssignedUnitId

      public void setAssignedUnitId(int id)
      Assigns a unit to the incident.
      Parameters:
      id - obtains the id of the unit assigned to that specific incident.
